ab: anema su pinakazuanan a mamaza?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: gemaljugalju aken a djemavac a sema maza.
anema su ljinevavavan?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: na ljevavaw aken ta basu.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: uri kemuda sun a sema kuikay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: uri cumuin aken ni kama a sema kiukay.
ch: B:爸爸要開車載我去教會。
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: djemavadjavac timadju a sema gakku?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: ini, maka ta tjiing timadju a sema gakku.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: kemuda a su vuvu a veneli ta ljaceng?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: ramaljeng anga ti vuvu, ljakua maqati anan a emutubay a veneli ta ljaceng.
ch: B:雖然vuvu年紀大了,但是還能騎摩托車去買菜。
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: maka hikuki sun a sema drani?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: ini, uri maka ta varukur aken a sema drani.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: saka, uri kemuda timadju a sema drani?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: uri maka ta hikuki timadju uta.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: anema ljinevavauvan nimadju a sema takaw?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: malingac a ljevavaw ta basu timadju, qaw! na maka ta kauty timadju a sema takaw.
ch: B:他搭巴士會暈，所以他搭高鐵去高雄。
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: na maka ta kisia timadju a sema valangaw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ui na maka kisiya timadju a sema valangaw.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: na maka kisia timadju a sema valangaw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ini, na maka ta hikuki timadju a sema valangaw.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: inu a tjalja demutan ta siljevavavan ta basu?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: sevecu a pasa sangas, mapacun a siljevavavan ta basu.
ch: B:順著往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: If you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: izua ljaljevavavan ta tjiin imaza?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: neka nu tjiin imaza, amin a haia a su ljevavavan.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: nu maka ta basu, pida milingan a tja sidjaljun i gakku?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: tapuluq saka lima a bung, djemaljun itjen.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: uri pida milingan, nu ljevavaw itjen ta kauti a kemasi takaw a tjalju taiciw?
ch: A:從高雄搭高鐵到台中要多久時間?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: ita a milingan a tja sidjaljun.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: cuay nu emungeting itjen a sema udray?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: kimaya ita a milingan.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: uri maka ta tiin sun a ma tjanuamen?
ch: A:你今天要搭捷運來我家嗎?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: izua ku kudain, ika aken a maqati a sema tjanumun nusauni.
ch: B:我有事，今天沒辦法過去。
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: saigu sun a zemingdingsia?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: ui, saigu aken a zimdingsia.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: izua su utubay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: ui, izua ku utubai a ita.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: izua su utubay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: neka ku utubay.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
